name: Bean Tortilla Casserole
keywords: vegetables tortillas main dish mexican poultry
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Green Onions with Tops, Sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pinto beans by soaking them overnight or heating water and cooking until tender.
2. Finely chop the onion, mince the garlic, and prepare the chiles (see note).
3. In a large bowl, mix the cooked chicken, sour cream, Monterey Jack cheese, vegetables, and seasonings.
4. Add the vegetable oil and combine all ingredients thoroughly.
5. Place warmed tortillas in an oven-safe dish.
6. Spoon the mixture onto each tortilla, spreading evenly.
7. Sprinkle green onions on top.
8. Cover with foil and bake at 350°F (175°C) for 20-25 minutes until heated through and cheese is melted.
